name: QA 845
description:
PCP QA Test No. 845

Exercise the mounts PMDA Install/Remove and basic functionality.



Copyright (c) 2015-2016 Red Hat.



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py ubuntu2404 reproduce

Copyright (c) 2015-2016 Red Hat.

To reproduce this test, please run:

testStage.description:
PCP QA Test No. 845

Exercise the mounts PMDA Install/Remove and basic functionality.



Copyright (c) 2015-2016 Red Hat.



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py ubuntu2404 reproduce
